fefa0b21-42c5-495e-aa21-dc3352de2e24.name: John Doe
fefa0b21-42c5-495e-aa21-dc3352de2e24.bio: This is my fucking bio. I want to make it long because I don't want there to be any guessing as to my intentions to absolutely fill the available space, even if with only useless information. For example, I hate cats, and I hate death. I am also adding more stuff because I want to see the lengths which the container will agree to grow into. Wish me luck

3a47fa78-6623-4eb7-a6c8-ecc4ab5c2cf7.text: Why the bad request, wtf, this is giving me such a headache

82f53926-bcf8-4c0e-8b39-6d744c00ecad.text: Let's say I want to post the most obnoxiously long post ever, I would have to type and type and type and type. Mind you the size of this container is not something I, by myself created, and yet I must do this over and over and over again.

1f5c8002-a949-4806-9cf6-7ed0288c9708.text: Container stays the same size until user starts typing again. Not a terrible issue perse but worth noting as a design flaw. And the readability is a bit messed up
